format.raw: ASA-$SEVERITY-305011 Built dynamic UDP translation from inside$SRC_IP$SRC_PORT to outside$DST_IP$DST_PORT

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="2" regex="ASA-(\d)-(\d{6})\s+Built dynamic\s+(\w+)\s+translation from\s+\S+([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{1,3}){3})(\d{1,5})\s+to\s+\S+([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{1,3}){3})(\d{1,5}).*" arr_length="7">
    <Field position="0" name="severity" />
    <Field position="1" name="syslog_code" />
    <Field position="2" name="prtc" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="3" name="src_ip" />
    <Field position="4" name="src_port" />
    <Field position="5" name="dstn_ip" />
    <Field position="6" name="dstn_port" />
    <Field position="7" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('cisco')]]" />
    <Field position="8" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('asaseries')]]" />
    <Field position="9" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="10" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v9')]]" />
    <Field position="11" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Cisco]_asaseries_security_v9_syslog')]]" />
    <Field position="12" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="13" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
